case_title: ROBERTA MOORE VS. J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, ROBERTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION CO. $305.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT WAS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, ROBERTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION CO. $305.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION CO. IS GRANTED. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
